subject: Fwd: Latest draft

body_html:
FYI 

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "Steven Storch" <sstorch@samlegal.com>
Date: May 7, 2008 2:38:20 PM GMT-04:00
To: <dkiesq@aol.com>
Subject: Latest draft

Darren, there are a few new things that I want woven into the latest draft based on  some new information we have reviewed. I should have the newest version to you this evening.

I am in Boston during the day tomorrow but should be back in my office around 4 and then am in all day Friday and available through the weekend.

Steven G. Storch

Storch Amini & Munves, P.C.
2 Grand Central Tower
140 E. 45th Street
New York, New York 10017

Fax: (212) 490-4208

Confidentiality Notice: The information contained in this e-mail and any attachments may be legally privileged and confidential. If you have received this e-mail in error, please notify the sender and permanently delete the e-mail and any attachments immediately. You should not retain, copy or use this e-mail or any attachment for any purpose, nor disclose all or any part of the contents to any person. Thank you.
